hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a secure compliance operating layer with role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity, and governance controls to support institutional-grade digital asset compliance.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Enterprises risk inconsistent access governance and incomplete audit logs when compliance security architecture is fragmented. This creates challenges for compliance teams needing clear operational control, evidence integrity and reliable bank due diligence readiness.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects role-based access, permissions, audit logs and evidence integrity into a single secure framework that supports consistent governance, operational control and bank due diligence readiness.
workflow_title: From access policy to audit-ready evidence
workflow_description: SFTY enforces role-based access and permissions while preserving decision logs and evidence to maintain a secure, auditable compliance control environment.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another silo. The security architecture
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a secure, role-based compliance layer that unifies audit evidence, governance, permissions and operational control for enterprise readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY delivers a controlled compliance layer for VASPs, combining secure provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and enterprise-grade deployment to support institutional governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How does SFTY support secure compliance architecture design
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how SFTY manages role-based access and permissions
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve evidence integrity across workflows
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe SFTY’s approach to enterprise deployment and governance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY serves regulated digital asset businesses by connecting provider outputs into a connected compliance layer that supports auditability, governance, case management, and reporting workflows workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures provider data and rules into controlled workflows that route reviews, open cases, log decisions, preserve evidence, and prepare reports across compliance operations.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, evidence packages and rule change approvals to support audit readiness and defensible compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: How is SFTY deployed securely in enterprises?
faq_4_answer: SFTY supports role-based access control, audit logs, encryption, configurable data retention and controlled deployment suited for regulated enterprise environments.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers by integrating their outputs into structured compliance workflows and evidence.
final_title: Review secure compliance workflows and governance
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity and operational security for institutional compliance teams.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
